name: ip_prosecution
description: a patent prosecution lifecycle world; actions file, office_action, respond, grant

card.description: a patent prosecution lifecycle world; actions file, office_action, respond, grant

rules: 'file' starts prosecution: only an unfiled application can be filed, moving it from 'unfiled' to 'pending'.
'office_action' is the examiner issuing a rejection; it is valid from 'pending' or 'responded', sets status to 'awaiting_response', and increments office_actions.
'respond' is valid only while an office action is outstanding ('awaiting_response'); it sets status to 'responded', increments responses, and narrows the claim set by three (floor of one claim).
'grant' allows the application from 'pending' or 'responded' (never while an OA is outstanding), setting status to 'granted'.
Prosecution may loop office_action -> respond any number of times before a grant. Illegal-for-status actions are no-ops.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name") if isinstance(action, dict) else action

    status = s.get("status", "unfiled")

    if name == "file":
        # Only an unfiled application can be filed.
        if status == "unfiled":
            s["status"] = "pending"
            s["filed"] = True

    elif name == "office_action":
        # The examiner can act on a fresh filing or after a response.
        if status in ("pending", "responded"):
            s["status"] = "awaiting_response"
            s["pending_office_action"] = True
            s["office_actions"] = int(s.get("office_actions", 0)) + 1

    elif name == "respond":
        # The applicant may only respond while an OA is outstanding.
        if status == "awaiting_response":
            s["status"] = "responded"
            s["pending_office_action"] = False
            s["responses"] = int(s.get("responses", 0)) + 1
            # Responding amends/narrows the claims (never below one claim).
            s["claims"] = max(1, int(s.get("claims", 0)) - 3)

    elif name == "grant":
        # Allowance is possible from a clean pending app or after a response,
        # but never while an office action is still outstanding.
        if status in ("pending", "responded"):
            s["status"] = "granted"
            s["granted"] = True
            s["pending_office_action"] = False

    # Unknown or illegal-for-status actions leave the world unchanged.
    return s

emit.report: Patent application status: {status}. Filed: {filed}. Office actions issued: {office_actions}; responses filed: {responses}. Claims on file: {claims}. Granted: {granted}.
